# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. This is the installable lockfile.
#
# It is regenerated weekly by .github/workflows/weekly-maintenance.yml, which runs
# `pip-compile --upgrade requirements.in` and opens a PR with the refreshed pins.
# To change dependencies, edit requirements.in and let the workflow (or a local
# `pip-compile` run) rebuild this file.
#
# Until the first weekly run pins exact versions, this mirrors requirements.in and is
# still installable with `pip install -r requirements.txt`.

# --- Ingestion scripts (Module 2): scripts/fetch_transcripts.py ---
youtube-transcript-api>=1.0

# --- Content extraction agent (extractor_agent/) ---
# Only for the natural-language agent; the deterministic scripts need none of these.
# Default framework is LangChain; Microsoft Agent Framework is an option (--framework maf).
langchain>=1.0
langgraph
langchain-openai
agent-framework-core
agent-framework-openai

# --- RAG index over notes and docs (rag/) ---
chromadb

# --- Content writing agent (writer/) ---
anthropic

# --- Notion review output (notion_review/) ---
notion-client
